name: abstract_mcp_dlm_lakes_agent
description: Local agent descriptor proof for a lakes-only MCP/DLM tool-call intent with JSON output.

prompt.objective: Prepare a JSON-only summary from the server-authorized dlm.lakes.list tool intent.
instructions: Request dlm.lakes.list with JSON response format.
Do not call DLM Core, OBS, storage, providers, MCP servers, or HTTP APIs directly from Python.
constraints: No credentials, headers, tokens, URLs, buckets, object keys, storage paths, raw provider payloads, raw tool responses, or raw DLM/Core responses.
The descriptor is intent only until Assets/Core authorizes live execution.
prompt.output_expectation: Return tool_results as a JSON object containing safe status, capability_ref, response_format, and result summary.

fields.name: limit
fields.description: Diagnostic maximum for the local lakes-list intent.

bindings.name: abstract_dlm_lakes_list
bindings.description: Safe lakes-list tool intent only. Assets/Core own live MCP/DLM execution.
